enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a life update from Boulder after a month-long gap since his last vlog, describing his ongoing work on a historical timeline project that links horizontal and vertical navigation, organizing thousands of Flickr photos of battles and castles by century, and plans to eventually start a Patreon. He also mentions feeling physically well (no asthma), receiving books from his mom, and trying to sell his van.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Wants to join once he has consistent output ready, prefers batching content factory-style first for efficiency
Strongly prefers doing everything in bulk/factory style at once rather than inconsistently over time
Excited about it but finds linking every king across horizontal and vertical navigation tedious and gets bored
Feels good when not having asthma attacks and intends to keep momentum as long as health allows

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's 6:10pm on October 20, 2017.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The last video he did was on September 16th.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Time flew by quickly since the last video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His roommate joined him for three days in a row, which activated his taste for refurging.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He had a bunch of bugs but didn't get that much.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He no longer has a mullet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He got a new house.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He fixed leaks on his timeline multiple times.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wanted the horizontal part of the timeline to link to the vertical part and vice versa.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Doing this for every single king ever would take too much time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He got bored with the timeline work and started focusing on picture quality.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He has the idea of making videos showing every single soldier.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He already has 40,000 people but might need more.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to make screen captures of individual people and add their centuries and locations.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wants to add flicker pictures to all the kings, which will take time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He organized his flicker yesterday, uploading 62 different folders of castles.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He realized he already did a book and put it all up.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is searching for battles and touching all the photos he has of battles to add to his timeline.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He has made videos of all the tribes of Gaul, Spain, and Italy from a long time ago.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He still needs to upload all that content to YouTube.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to start a Patreon for regular contributions for his work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wants to collect all the stuff and get it up to speed before starting Patreon.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He believes doing everything factory-style at once is more efficient.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He has 5,000 battles on Flicker.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He has 1,300 pictures for the 1800s, 19,300 for the 1900s, and 207 for the 2000s.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: If he gets bored with battles, he might start working on castles.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He doesn't have the locations of the castles yet, which is a lot of work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He feels good physically and doesn't have asthma currently.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When he starts getting asthma every night, he will start writing his book.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is making good progress and hopes to finish the 1800s with 1,300 pictures in a couple of days.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His mom gave him certain fat books today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is still trying to solve issues with his van.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He has a lot of nicks and stuff.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He doesn't have the paperwork for the van.
